medicines.name: Augmentin DDS Suspension
medicines.composition: Amoxycillin Trihydrate IP 200mg + Potassium Clavulanate Diluted IP 28.5mg per 5ml

medicines.name: Shelcal 500
medicines.composition: Calcium Carbonate IP 1.25g (equiv. to Elemental Calcium 500mg) + Vitamin D3 IP 250 IU

medicines.name: Skinlite Cream 25g
medicines.composition: Hydroquinone USP 2.0% w/w + Tretinoin IP 0.025% w/w + Mometasone Furoate IP 0.1% w/w

medicines.name: Panderm + Super Cream
medicines.composition: Clobetasol Propionate IP 0.05% w/w + Neomycin Sulfate IP 0.5% w/w + Miconazole Nitrate IP 2.0% w/w

medicines.name: Montek-LC
medicines.composition: Montelukast Sodium IP 10mg + Levocetirizine Dihydrochloride IP 5mg

tests.name: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
tests.description: Evaluates overall health and detects a wide range of disorders, including anemia, infection, and leukemia.

tests.name: 12-Lead Electrocardiogram (ECG)
tests.description: Records the electrical signals of your heart to check for different heart conditions and structural performance.

tests.name: Brain MRI (Plain)
tests.description: High-resolution magnetic resonance imaging to look for strokes, tumors, aneurysms, and nervous system mapping irregularities.

tests.name: Electroencephalogram (EEG)
tests.description: Tracks and records brain wave patterns to evaluate electrical activity for epilepsy or sleep disorders.

tests.name: HbA1c (Glycated Haemoglobin)
tests.description: Measures your average blood sugar levels over the past 3 months to monitor and diagnose Type 2 diabetes tracks.

tests.name: Echocardiogram (2D Echo)
tests.description: Ultrasound imaging of the heart architecture to observe real-time blood movement patterns and valve function.

tests.name: Chest X-Ray PA View
tests.description: Standard diagnostic imaging scan used to evaluate the lungs, heart wall alignment, and thoracic skeletal structure frameworks.

tests.name: Liver Function Test (LFT)
tests.description: Measures specific enzyme, protein, and bilirubin structures in your blood to evaluate general liver performance parameters.

tests.name: Nerve Conduction Velocity (NCV) Test
tests.description: Measures how fast electrical signals move through your peripheral nerves to diagnose neuropathy syndromes.

tests.name: Random Blood Sugar (RBS)
tests.description: Rapid testing tracking current glucose levels in circulating bloodstream components.
